question:
Will Brazil take second place in Miss Universe 2025?

Description: The Miss Universe 2025 competition is scheduled to be held in Thailand on November 21, 2025. You can find more information about that here: https://www.missuniverse.com/the-competition-thailand/

This market will resolve according to the listed country represented by the contestant named first runner-up in this competition. 

If the result of this competition isn't known by December 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on official results as reported by the Miss Universe Organization.

Her platform focuses on the Butterfly Effect Project, an initiative centered on youth empowerment, mentorship, and community development. evidences.title: Sash Factor, Missosology place PH bet Ahtisa Manalo among final picks ahead of Miss Universe 2025 coronation • PhilSTAR Life
evidences.content: generations generations # Sash Factor, Missosology place PH bet Ahtisa Manalo among final picks ahead of Miss Universe 2025 coronation Miss Universe Philippines Ahtisa Manalo is gaining significant momentum hours ahead of the final competition, solidifying her status as a top contender by placing highly in major pageant predictions. She notably secured spots in the Top 5 of both Sash Factor and Missosology's hot picks, placing third in the former's Miss Universe 2025 final sash pick. The international pageant portal picked Miss Coté D'Ivoire Olivia Yace for the top spot, and Thailand's Praveenar Singh for second place. Completing Sash Factor's top 5 picks are Miss Venezuela Stephany Abasali in the fourth spot and Puerto Rico's Zashley Alicea in the fifth spot. [...] Rounding out the pageant portal's top 10 are Colombia's Vanessa Pulgarin in sixth, Guadeloupe's Ophely Mezino in seventh, Mexico's Fatima Bosch in eighth, Ecuador's Nadia Mejia in ninth, and Miss Universe Latina Yamilex Hernandez in 10th. Meanwhile, beauty pageant platform Missology also released its final picks, placing Thailand in the top spot, with Colombia in second, Mexico in third, the Philippines in fourth, an...

evidences.title: These are all the Latin American representatives in Miss Universe 2025: Mexico, Venezuela, Colombia, Puerto Rico, and more - AS USA
evidences.content: This edition promises to be historic, marking the debut of nations such as Palestine, Saudi Arabia, and Mozambique, while others - including Azerbaijan, Slovenia, Ghana, Haiti, Iraq, Kosovo, Panama, and South Africa - make their return to the world’s most prestigious beauty pageant. All contestants from Latin America have been confirmed and are already in Thailand, ready to compete for the Miss Universe 2025 crown. The grand finale of the 74th Miss Universe pageant will take place at Impact Arena in Pak Kret, Thailand, on November 21. Here’s a look at all the Latina contenders. ## Meet the Latina Delegates Heading to Miss Universe 2025 [...] As always, the pageant unfolds over several days with a series of activities in the host country. Delegates began arriving in early November and have taken part in fashion shows, city tours, and gala dinners. On November 19, the national costume show and the preliminary competition will be held, featuring the evening gown and swimsuit rounds. ## Related stories ## From wildlife to the ballroom: How Steve Irwin’s family is still inspiring millions ## Travis Kelce stars off-field in Taylor Swift’s upcoming Disney+ docuseries Get your game on!...

evidences.title: Here's When & Where to Watch the 2025 Miss Universe Pageant in ...
evidences.content: For audiences in the United States, the 2025 Miss Universe pageant will be available to stream via Telemundo and Peacock on Nov. 20. But you won’t have to get up early to watch it. Instead, the finals will take place at 8 a.m. in Thailand on Nov. 21. That means coverage will begin at 8 p.m. ET/ 7 p.m. CT/5 p.m. PT in the U.S. on Nov. 20. Preliminary coverage on Telemundo starts an hour before the show. The contest will be held at the exhibition and convention center Impact Challenger Hall in Pak Kret, Nonthaburi, Thailand. Carlos Adyan, Danilo Carrera, Jessica Carrillo, and Jacqueline Bracamonte will be the hosts. [...] And if you’re interested in the preliminary and National Costume Competitions, those will be airing Wednesday, November 19. They will be livestreamed on the Telemundo App, the @telemundoentretenimiento YouTube and Telemunfo Al Día FAST Channels. It will be at 1 p.m. Thailand time. That’s 1 a.m. ET. Related ### Miss Mexico Fátima Bosch Wins Miss Universe 2025 Miss Universe 2025 has been at the center of controversy this year, after Miss Mexico Fátima Bosch was called “dumb” by pageant executive Nawat Itsaragrisil during a pre-competition event that was streamed li...

evidences.title: Angolan Beauty Wins Miss Universe Pageant
evidences.content: Angolan Beauty Wins Miss Universe Pageant Angola's Leila Lopes was crowned Miss Universe 2011 Monday night in Sao Paulo, Brazil. The 25-year-old Lopes becomes the first woman from the Southern African country to win the coveted title, beating out 88 other contestants at on beauty pageant's 60th anniversary. She succeeds 2010 Miss Universe Ximena Navarette of Mexico. Miss Ukraine, Olesia Stefanko was named first runner-up, which means she will assume the title of Miss Universe if Lopes cannot fulfill her duties. Brazil's Priscila Machado was second runner-up, followed by Miss Philippines, Shamcey Supsup, and Miss China, ZiLin Luo. Some information for this report was provided by AP, AFP and Reuters. Angolan Beauty Wins Miss Universe Pageant ##### This item is part of [...] ## Accessibility links Skip to main Navigation Skip to Search ##### Follow Us Languages site logo site logo site logo site logo Previous Next Breaking News Arts & Culture # Angolan Beauty Wins Miss Universe Pageant Angolan Beauty Wins Miss Universe Pageant [...] ##### This item is part of Arts & Culture Africa ​

evidences.title: List of Miss Universe editions — Grokipedia
evidences.content: 59th Miss Universe 2010: Held on August 23, 2010, at Mandalay Bay Events Center in Las Vegas, Nevada, United States, with 83 entrants; won by Ximena Navarrete of Mexico.(#ref-13)](#ref-13) 60th Miss Universe 2011: Held on September 12, 2011, at Credicard Hall in São Paulo, Brazil, with 89 entrants; won by Leila Lopes of Angola.(#ref-13)](#ref-13) 61st Miss Universe 2012: Held on December 19, 2012, at PH Live at Planet Hollywood Resort & Casino in Las Vegas, Nevada, United States, with 89 entrants; won by Olivia Culpo of the United States.(#ref-13)](#ref-13) 62nd Miss Universe 2013: Held on November 9, 2013, at Crocus City Hall in Moscow, Russia, with 86 entrants; won by Gabriela Isler of Venezuela.(#ref-13)](#ref-13) [...] ### 2010–2024 [...] The Miss Universe pageant from 2010 to 2024 emphasized global diversity and inclusivity, with frequent hosting in the United States—such as Las Vegas, Nevada, in 2010, 2012, 2015, and 2017—highlighting the event's enduring commercial appeal in its country of origin.(#ref-2)](#ref-2) The 2020 edition, delayed by the COVID-19 pandemic, was held in May 2021 at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Florida, with limited in-person atte...

evidences.title: Become a National Director - Miss Universe
evidences.content: First,submit an application via our form. You will be asked to answer questions about financial resources, team, sponsors, projected profit & loss, detailed proposal; as well as your biography, resume, social media accounts, judge selection process and more. Second, pay application fee of $1,000 USD via Stripe – this will be used to cover the cost of background checks. Third, complete a virtual interview with a Miss Universe Organization representative and pass a background check. evidences.title: All Miss Universe winners throughout the years | PEP.ph
evidences.content: With each new titleholder, Miss Universe crowns not only a stunning individual that represents her country with poise and purpose, but also a spokesperson who embodies strength, confidence, and a commitment to global unity. Over the years, the Miss Universe pageant has reflected the changing ideals of beauty and empowerment across generations. Each Miss Universe winner has left an indelible mark through the decades, from exuding elegance in the 1950s to being the embodiment of female empowerment today. This list honors these exceptional women who have worn the crown, shining the spotlight on the titleholders from 2010 to 2024. ## MISS UNIVERSE WINNERS FROM 2020 TO 2024 ### Miss Universe 2024 Name: Maria Victoria Kjær Theilvig Country: Denmark Birthdate: November 13, 2003 [...] During her reign, she actively represented the United States internationally and engaged in humanitarian work, including a visit to Indonesia for the United Nations Population Fund. And I'm just hopeful that we can all move on from this and refocus on all of our contestants and the journey. evidences.title: Miss Universe 2025: Ahtisa Manalo in pageant platforms’ top picks
evidences.content: Manalo was listed among pageant observers’ top picks for Miss Universe 2025. The coronation show was scheduled for Friday, Nov. 21 at the Impact Challenger Hall in Nonthaburi, Bangkok, Thailand, and Missosology also mentioned several other contestants as bubbling-up candidates.
